overall.description: Game engine footage from a wizarding school setting, showing a grand Gothic hall with a central fountain statue and ornate stone architecture, viewed from an elevated balcony. Students in dark robes walk through the hall below and past the camera while the controlled character observes the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with central fountain and dual staircases

agents.ego_description: standing on upper balcony overlooking the grand hall, watching students below

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking past the camera on the balcony from right to left

entered.detail: large ornate fountain with rearing horse statue at the center of the hall
massive stone relief mural covering the far wall behind the fountain
sweeping stone staircase with balustrades ascending to upper levels
sweeping stone staircase with balustrades ascending to upper levels
Gothic stone arches and columns framing the hall entrance
heavy stone balustrade and wall of the upper balcony level
intricate geometric marble tiling in red and cream colors

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a grand Gothic hall viewed from an elevated balcony. A magnificent fountain with a rearing horse statue dominates the center, while students in dark robes walk across the patterned marble floor below. The camera remains stationary behind a character observing the activity, as other students occasionally walk past on the balcony level.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with central fountain and dual staircases

events.description: ego character begins walking forward along the balcony, shifting perspective slightly

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the balcony while continuing to observe the hall below

notable_agents.action: group of three students walking together across the main hall floor

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along the balcony, maintaining the view of the grand hall. Students continue to move through the space below, with small groups forming and dispersing. The lighting remains moody and atmospheric, highlighting the stone architecture and the central fountain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stationary observation point on an elevated balcony into a slow walk along the perimeter of a grand Gothic hall. It begins with a fixed view overlooking a magnificent fountain with a rearing horse statue, while students in dark robes traverse the patterned marble floor below. As the character begins to move, the perspective shifts from a still observation to a gliding motion along the balcony, keeping the central fountain and the atmospheric stone architecture in sight. The scene then expands to reveal the fluid movement of students forming and dispersing in small groups across the hall, all under a moody and consistent light.
